title: Caverns & Chasms: Ingot Compat
description: C&C: Ingot Compat adds placeable ingots for your favorite mods!
body:
Worried **Caverns & Chasms**'s placeable ingots wouldn't have compatibility? Fear not! **C&C: Ingot Compat** adds placeable ingots for your favorite mods!

<details>
<summary>Supported mods</summary>

- Create
- Galosphere
- Iron's Spellbooks
- Tinker's Construct
- Oreganized
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Born in Chaos
- Samurai Dynasty
- Gobber
- Malum
- Immersive Engineering
- Scorched Guns
- Sculk Horde
- Thermal Series
- Metal Works
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Supplementaries
- Mekanism
- Extra Shiny
- Terramity
- The Twilight Forest
- Deeper and Darker
- Create: Alloyed
- Netherific
- Alex's Caves
- Soulful Nether
- More Critters
- Aquaculture
- Nethelurgy
- Endelurgy
- Vanilla Backport
- The Undergarden
- BetterEnd
- BetterNether
- Twigs
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Create: Dreams n' Desires
- Darker Depths

Your favorite mod is not here? Suggest it in the [Github Issues](https://github.com/AtobaAzul/Caverns-N-Chasms-Ingot-Compat/issues)! 
</details>


<details>
<summary>Adding Custom Textures</summary>
By default, the mod generates its ingot block textures from the ingot item texture. This works for a majority of ingots but certain ingots are special and don't translate well into the block form.

If you wish to add custom textures, you can do so with a resource pack!
Simply put the texture in `assets/cc_compat/textures/block/<ingot namespace>_<ingot id>.png`
For a reference texture, take a look at the [base Caverns & Chasms textures](https://github.com/team-abnormals/caverns-and-chasms/blob/1.20.x/src/main/resources/assets/caverns_and_chasms/textures/block/gold_ingot.png).
</details>
